content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with NIFTY +0.22%, Bank Nifty +0.57%, Pharma leading +2.10%, Auto +0.83%. VIX compressing to 17.4 (-2.85%) signals risk-on. Global cues strongly positive (S&P +0.81%, Nasdaq +1.03%). Book is +0.42% on the day with most positions in green. Focus: trail SLs on winners, manage event-risk (NEULANDLAB May 12, CHOLAHLDNG May 8, HAL May 14), and selectively add only highest-quality setups given soft-cap discipline.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.4% unrealized at CMP 1047. Per trailing SL mandate (b): gain ≥4%, trail SL to max(entry, last - 2%) = max(984, 1026) = 1026. Currently 1025.86 — micro-tightening to 1030 still maintains 1.6% gap below CMP (>1% floor). Strong Q4 PAT +19%, ICICI Sec TP 1350, RBI rate-cut tailwind. Hold target 1110 — R:R intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.0% with VIX easing and gold under near-term pressure. SL 119 still ~4% below CMP 124.18 — within plan. Defensive ballast; no thesis break yet."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1712.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.7% from 1700. CMP 1729.50; current SL 1710 (sub-1% gap = self-stopout risk under trail-gap discipline). Raising SL marginally to 1712 — actually this would VIOLATE 1% gap rule (1729-1712=17.5 = 1.0%). Better: keep SL at 1710 since strong stake-sale digestion + Capital Group anchor. CORRECTION: leaving SL at 1710 is already ~1.1% below CMP — within rule. Switching this to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.1%, SL 206 just below CMP 207.24 (~0.6% gap = below trail-gap floor but this is the EXISTING SL not a new tightening). Q4 PAT +68%, NIM 6.2%, CLSA TP 220. Thesis intact; near-term wobble within tolerance. No modify needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4595.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.6% at CMP 4652. SL already at 4595 (entry 4575 = breakeven+). Per trailing rule (a) at +2%, SL should already be at breakeven — it is. No-op MODIFY would be wasted; switching to HOLD. NOTE: Q4 results May 14 = binary catalyst within ~6 sessions, NOT yet in 3-session window but watch. Will tighten further as event approaches."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.1% at CMP 7045. SL 6950 = ~1.35% below CMP, within 1% gap floor. Trail rule (a) triggered: gain ≥2%, SL should be ≥ entry. SL 6950 > entry 6900 — already at breakeven+. Q4 beat (PAT +114%), Geojit TP 8500. Thesis intact, no churn needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.5% at CMP 837.90. SL 825 = ~1.5% below CMP (within trail-gap floor). Gain not yet ≥2% so no breakeven trail mandate. Strong order book, Jefferies Buy TP 810 (already breached). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.4% at CMP 368.50, near 52-wk high 369.30. SL 358 ~3% below CMP — appropriate. Q4 PAT +30%, lending +32%, MOSL TP 325 already breached. No trail mandate triggered yet. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.9% at CMP 821. SL 812 = ~1.1% gap (just above floor). Q4 PAT +18%, India volume +9% best-in-class. Gain not yet ≥2%; no trail mandate. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.0% at CMP 3277 (improved from earlier). SL 3245 ~1% below CMP — at trail-gap floor. Q4 PAT +48.5%, dividend Rs 33. Thesis intact; intraday wobble within SL plan. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1259.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.3% at CMP 1287.80. SL already at 1259 (entry, breakeven). Trail rule (a) satisfied. No-op modify — switching to HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.1% at CMP 3028. SL 2900 ~4.2% below CMP. Defence cluster tailwind, +9% intraday. Gain insufficient for trail mandate. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail to 1030 per +4% gain rule; maintains 1.6% gap below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive ballast; SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1710 already ~1.1% below CMP; tighter would risk self-stopout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Negative P&L, SL plan in place."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven+; May 14 board meeting on watch — will trim/exit before 3-session window."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already breakeven+; thesis strong."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Gain <2%, no trail mandate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Slightly negative; SL 358 ~3% below CMP, appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Within SL plan."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Negative P&L, SL plan in place."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven; trail mandate satisfied."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Marginal gain; SL appropriate."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "HFCL pending BUY 600 @ 133.50 still OPEN — leaving in place, telecom infra thesis intact. CHOLAHLDNG (board May 8, 2 sessions) = binary event window, NO_ACTION on entry. NEULANDLAB (May 12 board) = also event window, plus pricey at 16,838 — pass. WOCKPHARMA +22% spike — single-day, fade-prone, pass. CAMS gap-up — wait for consolidation. SRF, VEDL, PNB, AJANTPHARM, BIOCON, AUROPHARMA, LINDEINDIA — qualifying setups but book already at 65% deployed and adding to financial/defence/pharma clusters would push correlation risk. Disciplined pass today.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 65% deployed, 35% cash — within soft target. Today's P&L +0.42% with most positions green. Cluster check: Financial Services has PNBHOUSING + BANDHANBNK + ABCAPITAL = ~25% of capital — at cluster limit, no more financial adds. Defence has HAL + GRSE + TITAGARH = ~15% — within limit but ample. Avoiding new entries today: (a) book is healthy, (b) HAL May 14 + CHOLAHLDNG May 8 + NEULANDLAB May 12 = multiple event windows approaching, (c) per Day-10 lesson, sub-0.70 conf event-trades destroy capital. Priority next session: tighten SLs as positions move favorably; pre-event trim on HAL if it approaches May 11."
}
